# RCSService.Business.OrganizationName.NameType

**Enumeration**

Enumeration representing the type of name specified by the business.

## Declaration

```swift
enum NameType
```

## Determining name type

- **RCSService.Business.OrganizationName.NameType.officialName**: Official name.

## Accessing organization name properties

- **displayName**: Display name for business.
- **nameType**: The type of the name.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
